overview: Six-agent pipeline transforms raw feature requests into polished SAFe specifications across three types, scoring on a 100-point rubric. Linear architecture with two conditional loops (Reviewerâ†’Improver for sections <75%, Improverâ†’Polish for 80-89 range) prevents mid-80s plateau.

keyPoints.title: Linear pipeline reflects true dependency chain
Two-tier conditional loops break score ceiling patterns
Golden test set required for reliable prompt evaluation
Section-isolated rescoring eliminates mysterious score drift
